---
name: "📚 Documentation Update"
about: "Request an update or improvement to the project documentation."
title: "[DOCS]: "
labels: ["documentation"]
---

# Documentation Update

## Summary

Provide a brief summary of the documentation update.

## Documentation Location

Specify the file or section that needs updating.

Examples:

- README.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md
- docs/setup.md

## Current Documentation

Describe the current documentation and explain what is outdated, incorrect, or missing.

## Suggested Update

Describe the changes that should be made.

## Reason

Explain why this documentation update is needed.

## Additional Context

Add any references, screenshots, links, or examples if applicable.
